view.title: Validate persona scenario #5

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: The exploratory step cannot be validated due to insufficient evidence regarding the visibility of queue and slot bookings.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the 'Waitlist to confirmed booking flow' scenario, specifically focusing on the visibility of queue and slot bookings at their respective channels. However, the evidence provided does not confirm whether the queue is visible at the kiosk or if the slot is visible online, which are critical aspects of the requirement. This lack of evidence leads to an inconclusive verdict as the necessary checks for visibility are absent.
